title: lupinus latifolius var. simplex
intro: Lupinus latifolius var. simplex, also known as the simple broad-leaved lupine, is a variety of the lupine plant species that is native to the western United States. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which have been traditionally used to treat a variety of health issues. The health benefits of Lupinus latifolius var. simplex include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and even help to alleviate symptoms of menopause. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used internally to promote overall health and well-being.
